meta.title: Cyber Physical with Jason Larsen
meta.description: 5-minutes from Jason's Highway training session. In this clip we show excerpts of "physics payloads" in a cyber / physical attack on an ICS. Jason covers a number of different categories of physics payloads, quickly and yet still in technical detail. The whole 40-minute session is amazing.
